mapper.sql: select a.ai_task_id, a.review_task_id, a.review_version_id, a.task_no, a.product_name, a.delivery_unit, a.submitter, a.priority, a.queue_position, a.task_status, a.estimated_duration, a.progress_percent, a.progress_text, a.ai_analysis_count, a.review_status, a.report_file_name, a.report_file_url, r.basis_file_urls, a.ai_summary, a.review_opinion, a.reviewer, a.submit_time, a.del_flag, a.create_by, a.create_time, a.update_by, a.update_time, a.remark from audit_ai_task a left join audit_review_task r on r.task_id = a.review_task_id
mapper.select: where a.del_flag = '0' order by a.queue_position asc, a.ai_task_id asc
where a.review_task_id = #{reviewTaskId} and a.review_version_id is null and a.del_flag = '0' order by a.ai_task_id desc limit 1

select finding_id, ai_task_id, finding_type, finding_title, finding_content, quote_text, page_no, location_json, sort_num from audit_ai_finding where ai_task_id = #{aiTaskId} order by sort_num asc, finding_id asc

select f.finding_id, f.ai_task_id, f.finding_type, f.finding_title, f.finding_content, f.quote_text, f.page_no, f.location_json, f.sort_num from audit_ai_finding f inner join audit_ai_task t on t.ai_task_id = f.ai_task_id where t.review_task_id = #{reviewTaskId} and t.del_flag = '0' order by t.update_time desc, t.ai_task_id desc, f.sort_num asc, f.finding_id asc

select f.finding_id, f.ai_task_id, f.finding_type, f.finding_title, f.finding_content, f.quote_text, f.page_no, f.location_json, f.sort_num from audit_ai_finding f inner join audit_ai_task t on t.ai_task_id = f.ai_task_id where t.review_version_id = #{reviewVersionId} and t.del_flag = '0' order by t.update_time desc, t.ai_task_id desc, f.sort_num asc, f.finding_id asc
select distinct submitter from audit_ai_task where del_flag = '0' and submitter is not null and submitter != '' order by submitter asc
mapper.insert: insert into audit_ai_task ( review_task_id, review_version_id, task_no, product_name, delivery_unit, submitter, priority, queue_position, task_status, estimated_duration, progress_percent, progress_text, ai_analysis_count, review_status, report_file_name, report_file_url, ai_summary, review_opinion, reviewer, submit_time, create_by, create_time, remark ) values ( #{reviewTaskId}, #{reviewVersionId}, #{taskNo}, #{productName}, #{deliveryUnit}, #{submitter}, #{priority}, #{queuePosition}, #{taskStatus}, #{estimatedDuration}, #{progressPercent}, #{progressText}, #{aiAnalysisCount}, #{reviewStatus}, #{reportFileName}, #{reportFileUrl}, #{aiSummary}, #{reviewOpinion}, #{reviewer}, #{submitTime}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark} )
mapper.update: update audit_ai_task set task_status = #{taskStatus}, progress_text = #{progressText}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where ai_task_id = #{aiTaskId}
update audit_ai_task set review_version_id = #{reviewVersionId}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where ai_task_id = #{aiTaskId} and del_flag = '0' and review_version_id is null
update audit_ai_task set priority = #{priority}, queue_position = #{queuePosition}, task_status = #{taskStatus}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where ai_task_id = #{aiTaskId}
mapper.delete:
delete from audit_ai_finding where ai_task_id in
#{aiTaskId}

delete from audit_ai_task where ai_task_id in
#{aiTaskId}
mapper.insert: insert into audit_ai_finding (ai_task_id, finding_type, finding_title, finding_content, quote_text, page_no, location_json, sort_num) values (#{aiTaskId}, #{findingType}, #{findingTitle}, #{findingContent}, #{quoteText}, #{pageNo}, #{locationJson}, #{sortNum})
mapper.update: update audit_ai_task set task_status = 'failed', progress_text = #{progressText}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where ai_task_id = #{aiTaskId}

update audit_ai_task set task_status = 'executing', progress_percent = #{progressPercent}, progress_text = #{progressText}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where ai_task_id = #{aiTaskId} and del_flag = '0' and task_status != 'executing'

update audit_ai_task set task_status = 'executing', progress_percent = ifnull(#{progressPercent}, progress_percent), progress_text = ifnull(#{progressText}, progress_text), update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where ai_task_id = #{aiTaskId} and del_flag = '0' and task_status not in ('completed', 'failed')

update audit_ai_task set task_status = 'waiting', progress_percent = #{progressPercent}, progress_text = #{progressText}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where ai_task_id = #{aiTaskId} and del_flag = '0' and task_status != 'executing'
mapper.select: where a.del_flag = '0' and a.task_status = 'waiting' order by case a.priority when 'high' then 1 when 'medium' then 2 else 3 end asc, a.queue_position asc, a.ai_task_id asc limit #{limit}
select count(1) from audit_ai_task where del_flag = '0' and task_status = 'executing'
